module.name: Fields
module.param: duration type callingPartyNumber originalCalledPartyNumber calledPartyNumber cause_description origDeviceName destDeviceName

module.name: PostProcess
module.param: | eval time=_time | fields - _time | convert ctime(time) | fields - detailLatest

module.name: Table
module.param: globalCallID_callManagerId, globalCallID_callId, globalCallId_ClusterID, call_id, durationInSeconds, data_type, type, detailEarliest, detailLatest

module.name: Search
module.param: | inputlookup field_gallery | search field="$row.cell.field$" | append [| makeresults count=1 | eval field="$row.cell.field$"] | stats last(*) as * by field | fillnull field value="$row.cell.field$" | fillnull sourcetype value="$row.fields.data_type$" | fillnull description value="Sorry there is no entry for this field" | table field description sourcetype type areas

module.name: Search
module.param: | stats count | fields - count | eval field1="$stat$($yField$) (descending)" | eval field2="$stat$($yField$) (ascending)" | eval field3="$xField$ (ascending)" | eval field4="$xField$ (descending)" | transpose | rename "row 1" as sortByLabel | eval sortByValue=replace(replace(sortByLabel,"\(ascending\)",""),"\(descending\)","desc")
